page: Microsoft Azure L4s_v4 is a virtual server belonging to the Lsv4 family, operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8573C processor built on the x86_64 architecture, delivering a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The hardware configuration provides 4 dedicated vCPUs derived from 2 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. Memory capacity stands at 32.0 GB, translating to 8.0 GB per core, and is paired with 960 GB of local storage that supports Premium Storage.

Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The server demonstrates strong single-threaded performance, with Geekbench single-core and single-threaded gzip compression tests scoring in the top 25%. Conversely, multi-core scaling is a primary tradeoff; stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression fall into the bottom 25%. Memory read bandwidth is also limited, though large-block write bandwidth remains in the average tier.

Given its hardware profile, this server offers qualitative resource density for workloads that prioritize single-thread speed and local storage over massive parallelization. It is best suited for database operations, text processing, and static web serving. It is less optimal for software compilation, memory-intensive caching, or medium-to-large scale LLM inference due to its constrained multi-core throughput and memory bandwidth.
description: Microsoft Azure L4s_v4 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Lsv4 family, powered by a dedicated 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 4 vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM. It features 960 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks indicate strong single-core performance, particularly in text processing and gzip compression, though multi-core scaling and memory read bandwidth are weaker. This configuration is well-suited for database operations, text processing, and lightweight web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure L4s_v4 is an Lsv4-family virtual machine featuring a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon processor, 4 dedicated vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and 960 GB of local storage, optimized for single-core workloads and databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure L4s_v4 features 4 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 960 GB local storage, delivering strong single-core performance for databases and text processing.
tagline: An x86 server combining strong single-threaded Intel Xeon performance with dedicated local storage and a high memory-to-core ratio.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz with 4 dedicated vCPUs
32.0 GB of system memory and 960 GB of local storage
Strong single-core performance in text processing and gzip compression
Lower multi-core scaling and memory read bandwidth limitations
Appropriate for database operations, text processing, and web serving
